mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TRADE_TYPE, DWT_START, DWT_END, ADVANCE_PAYMENT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_SHIP_PREPAY_STD
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_SHIP_PREPAY_STD( ID, TRADE_TYPE, DWT_START, DWT_END, ADVANCE_PAYMENT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dwtStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dwtEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{advancePayment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_SHIP_PREPAY_STD SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DWT_START = #{dwtStart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DWT_END = #{dwtEnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADVANCE_PAYMENT = #{advancePayment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
